mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, active, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT r.role FROM t_role r INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, active, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{active}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
